project_type: Full-stack PWA - Python FastAPI backend + React TypeScript frontend
test_framework: No test files found in codebase - use TypeScript compilation and build as verification
verification_instructions: 1. Run TypeScript compilation check (npx tsc --noEmit) in frontend. 2. Run vite build to verify bundle. 3. Check Python syntax with python -m py_compile on changed files.
setup_instructions: cd frontend && npm install. cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network - full access. No Supabase instance available for integration testing. Python 3.11 and Node 22 available.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing patterns in the codebase.
key_patterns: Backend: FastAPI routers in app/routers/, Pydantic models in app/models/, services in app/services/. Frontend: Pages in src/pages/{domain}/, API clients in src/api/, Types in src/types/, Uses TanStack Query for data fetching, react-router-dom for routing, TailwindCSS for styling. Forms use useState pattern (not react-hook-form in most pages). Staff types currently in src/types/task.ts.
directory_structure: Root has backend/ and frontend/. Backend: app/routers/ (API endpoints), app/models/ (Pydantic), app/services/ (business logic), app/middleware/, app/cron/. Frontend: src/pages/ (route pages), src/api/ (axios clients), src/types/ (TS types), src/components/ (shared UI), src/stores/ (Zustand).
